positive: Minimalist abstract jungle silhouette, featuring stylized tropical leaves, exotic flowers, and playful monkeys arranged in a strong, circular, central composition. The style is graphic, highly decorative, and high contrast, mimicking a vintage screen-printed woodcut or linocut design. Use solid color blocking with deep emerald green, burnt orange, teal, and ivory. The silhouettes must be crisp, clean, and optimized for apparel printing, achieving a beautiful interplay between negative space and bold shapes. Dramatic, flat lighting. Vector art quality.
negative: realistic, photorealistic, depth of field, blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, trademark, busy background, grayscale, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, messy, low detail
